atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Inject Tailwind's base, components, and utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline existing utility classes into custom CSS rules.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Register custom styles in Tailwind layers (base/components/utilities).

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Define Tailwind v4 design tokens directly in CSS.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Declare additional source paths for class detection in Tailwind v4.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Load a Tailwind plugin from CSS in Tailwind v4.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Declare custom utilities in Tailwind v4.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Wrap styles in a Tailwind variant context.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Target a configured responsive breakpoint (legacy Tailwind directive).
